idea-plugin.name: FileRush - Create Files Fast
idea-plugin.description:
Keyboard-first file creation and navigation. Fuzzy-find paths, autocomplete, and create files — no mouse needed.

Open with Ctrl+Alt+Shift+N. Navigate with Ctrl+N / Ctrl+P (or ↓ / ↑). Autocomplete path with Tab. Create and open with Enter.

Use Cases

  • Create a file in the current folder
    Open FileRush → press Tab to select the current folder → type the filename → Enter.
  • Create a file in another folder
    Type part of the folder name (fuzzy search finds it) → press Tab → type the filename → Enter.
  • Create a folder
    Same as above, but don't type a file extension. FileRush creates a directory instead.
  • Create a file beside an existing file
    Type part of an existing filename (e.g. UserRepo to find UserRepository.kt) → press Tab → the extension is pre-filled, just type your new name (e.g. CachedUserRepository) → Enter.

Customizing the Shortcut

  • Go to Settings → Keymap, search for FileRush, and assign any shortcut you want.
  • With IdeaVim, use the FileRush.Open action:
    nnoremap <leader>fc :action FileRush.Open<CR>

action.description: Open fuzzy path picker to create a new file
